bleedModel.description: No bleed specified for offset-printed booklets.

binding.description: Saddle-stitched (stapled at spine). Keep text 0.25" from spine edge.

surfaces.label: Front Cover

zones.label: Spine Gutter
zones.rule: Keep text and critical elements at least 0.25" from the left (spine) edge. Content too close will be hidden in the binding.

surfaces.llmPrompt:
You are designing the FRONT COVER of an 8.375×5.375" digest booklet.

Page size: 8.375" wide × 5.375" tall.
Stock: 60# Gloss Text.

The spine is on the LEFT edge. Keep all text and critical content at least 0.25" from the left edge (spine gutter) — content too close will be lost in the binding.

This booklet is NOT personalizable — no merge variables. It is offset printed (higher quality than digital).

Design tips:
- The front cover is the first impression — use bold, high-quality imagery.
- Images can extend to the spine but expect some loss in the binding fold.
- Page count must be 8, 12, 16, 20, 24, 28, or 32 (increments of 4).
- Design at 300 DPI minimum for offset printing quality.

surfaces.label: Interior Pages

zones.label: Spine Gutter
zones.rule: Keep text at least 0.25" from the spine (left) edge on right-hand pages, or right edge on left-hand pages.

surfaces.llmPrompt:
You are designing an INTERIOR PAGE of an 8.375×5.375" digest booklet.

Page size: 8.375" wide × 5.375" tall.

The spine gutter is on the binding edge (left for right-hand pages, right for left-hand pages). Keep text at least 0.25" from the binding edge.

This booklet is NOT personalizable — no merge variables. Offset printed.

Design tips:
- Design spreads with the gutter in mind — content crossing the center spread will have a gap at the spine.
- Maintain consistent margins across all pages.
- Total page count must be in increments of 4 (8, 12, 16, 20, 24, 28, or 32).

surfaces.label: Back Cover
surfaces.llmPrompt:
You are designing the BACK COVER of an 8.375×5.375" digest booklet.

Page size: 8.375" wide × 5.375" tall.

The back cover has no restricted zones — it is fully customizable.

Design tips:
- The back cover is often used for contact information, a final CTA, or branding.
- Not personalizable — no merge variables.
- Design at 300 DPI minimum.

notes: NOT personalizable (no merge variables) — offset printed.
A 9×6" digitally printed version with personalization is coming.
Page count must be in increments of 4 (8-32).
Saddle-stitched — keep text 0.25" from spine edge.
